traces.mapping_rationale: Direct bank match for the left join from train/test rows to building_metadata on building_id.
Direct bank match for the official split-matched weather lookup join by site_id and timestamp.
Direct bank match for converting the raw timestamp string column into datetime values.
Matches the notebook's extraction of stable hour/dayofweek/month features from timestamp.
Chosen as the closest bank action to the notebook's factorized primary_use encoding.
Matches the notebook's train-derived median fill for sparse building and weather columns.
Direct bank match for expanding the low-cardinality meter column with pd.get_dummies.
Direct bank match for the log1p transform applied to square_feet after the building join.
Chosen as the bank's model-specific target-transform row for the notebook's log1p meter_reading target.
Direct bank match for removing the original timestamp column after deriving date parts.
Direct bank match for removing row_id from the test-side feature matrix before inference.

omitted_notebook_steps.note: The notebook intentionally omits leak-style row filters, holiday features, grouped interpolation, and public-kernel side inputs because they are outside the benchmark's official-only contract.
